scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web,worker "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/config && npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/domain && npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/logger && npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/queue && npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/workflows && npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/capture-schema && npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/capture-catalog && npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/pipe-blueprint && npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/pipe-roomplan && npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/pipe-photogrammetry && npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/pipe-drone && npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/api && npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/web && npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspaces && npm run typecheck:e2e
scripts.ci:quality: bash -n scripts/*.sh && npm run lint && npm run format && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run web:bundle-budget && npm run check:dockerfile-imports
